Definition: Classification scheme for The Ontology Project — separates universal commons substrate from composable workflow extensions.
Universal cross-cutting entities that operators across multiple workflows recognize as first-class concepts.
ScopeNote: Inclusion test: do operators in workflows beyond a single domain recognize this concept as a first-class thing?

Definition: Domain-specific concepts that compose on top of the commons substrate. Workflows are composable; a single deployment can use multiple workflows simultaneously.
ScopeNote: Avoids the FIWARE Smart Data Models mistake of treating Healthcare/Manufacturing/Supply Chain as walled-off siblings.

Definition: Any individual human in any operational context — staff/member/employee/contractor/investigator.
ScopeNote: Person is for operational humans. Trial subjects are Participant (workflow extension); patients are Patient (future).

Definition: Any legal/business entity — corporate parent/operating company/hospital/regulatory authority/CRO.
ScopeNote: Organization is corporate identity. Roles played on specific objects are workflow extensions.

Definition: Any physical or operational location where work happens — hospital/manufacturing plant/research facility/warehouse.
ScopeNote: MOVED to commons in v0.7 from prior clinical-trials placement.

Definition: Any file/record/formal artifact across regulated workflows.
Any physical device or instrument used in operational work.
Any computerized/software system used in regulated workflows — EDC/CTMS/eTMF/ERP/EMR/IRT/LIMS/MES.
ScopeNote: Three-axis pattern: operatedBy/usedBy/oversightHeldBy.

Definition: Any temporal trail — communication log/equipment monitoring log/audit log/training log/delegation log.
Any storage facility or sub-facility — freezer slot/refrigerator shelf/secure cabinet/ambient pharmacy shelf/offsite vault.
ScopeNote: Equipment provides StorageLocations (freezer = Equipment with multiple StorageLocations).

Definition: Any qualification/license/certification — institutional CLIA cert/professional license/GCP cert/IATA shipping cert/equipment calibration.
Any operational encounter — clinical visit/audit visit/supply-chain delivery visit/manufacturing site visit.
ScopeNote: MOVED to commons in v0.7 from prior clinical-trials placement.

Definition: Any categorized occurrence with severity/causality/outcome — adverse event/manufacturing OOS/code blue/temperature excursion/regulatory finding.
ScopeNote: Universal across workflows. eventCategory enum varies by workflow.

Definition: Any review committee with authority over operational work — IRB/EC/DSMB/IDMC/P&T committee/audit committee.
ScopeNote: MOVED to commons in v0.7 from prior clinical-trials placement.

Definition: A unit of operational work performed at a Visit. Universal across workflow types.
ScopeNote: Same TOP entity shape regardless of activityType. Specialization is content not entity shape.

Definition: A leaf data-capture unit — one per measurement/response/dose/observation. Polymorphic taskValue covers any data shape.
ScopeNote: Task IS the CRF entry from the EDC perspective.

Definition: An operator-narrative observation captured during a Visit; may escalate to a categorized Event.
ScopeNote: OOUX Path C reportability handoff.

Definition: The workflow of running a clinical research study under regulatory protocol.
The workflow of clinical care delivery — hospital/ambulatory/telehealth.
ScopeNote: Future extension; not yet lifted.

Definition: The workflow of running manufacturing operations — pharma/biotech/device under GMP.
ScopeNote: Future extension; not yet lifted.

Definition: The workflow of running supply-chain operations — distribution/cold chain/sample logistics.
ScopeNote: Future extension; not yet lifted.

Definition: An operator-facing entity that captures one Organization's role on one Study (per-Org-per-Study pattern).
A research project to evaluate the effects of an intervention or characterize a population. Central organizing entity of clinical research.
A real human enrolled in a Study at a StudySite. The trial-conduct-realm role of the underlying human.
ScopeNote: Multi-realm projection: same human is Participant in clinical research / Patient in care delivery / Claimant in claims.

Definition: A person in the recruitment funnel for a Study but not yet consented.
ScopeNote: Pre-consent realm; converts to Participant when consent is obtained.

Definition: The substance/biologic/device/combination product under investigation in a Study.
The per-Study site participation pivot. Captures a Site's role on a specific Study.
ScopeNote: RECLASSIFIED in v0.7 from commons (topc:) to clinical-research extension (topcr:).

Definition: The canonical study-design document. Sub-object of Study.
A study arm — treatment group/comparator/observational cohort.
The visit-by-procedure matrix for the study.
A measurable outcome used to evaluate the study's intervention or natural history.
A specific characteristic potential Participants must have to be eligible.
A specific characteristic that disqualifies potential Participants.
The protocol-defined visit template (USDM-ingest-derivable).
ScopeNote: Distinct from topc:Visit (operational occurrence).

Definition: An informed-consent event under GCP.
An eligibility-screening event for a Participant.
The enrollment event — eligibility confirmed.
A withdrawal/discontinuation event.
A manufacturing batch of an InvestigationalProduct.
A blinded packaging unit prepared from a Lot/assigned to a Participant via IRT.
